case_title: ANTOINETTE BANKS VS. HOME DEPOT USA INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,583.94 FILED BY BANKS, ANTOINETTE AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT USA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANKS, ANTOINETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT USA INC. $1,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT USA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANTOINETTE BAMKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT USA, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOANNE EVANGELISTA, SPECIALTY ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
